2607.07409.title: DeLS-Spec: Decoupled Long-Short Contexts for Parallel Speculative Drafting
2607.07409.notes: Extends DFlash with lightweight local head as short-context expert. Implementation branches: feat/dels_spec, feat/dels-spec-v2.

2605.29343.title: Draft-OPD: On-Policy Distillation for Speculative Draft Models
2605.29343.notes: Training method improvement only (on-policy distillation). No new model architecture. Worth pursuing as a manual training enhancement PR.

2606.04446.title: D2SD: Accelerating Speculative Decoding with Dual Diffusion Draft Models
2606.04446.notes: Requires dual diffusion model infrastructure not present in codebase. Too architecturally different.

2605.27255.title: PIPO: Pair-In, Pair-Out Latent Multi-Token Prediction
2605.27255.notes: Modifies backbone model directly (input compression + MTP head). Doesn't fit speculators' separate-model paradigm.

2606.02544.title: SimSD: Simple Speculative Decoding in Diffusion Language Models

2603.03251.title: Speculative Speculative Decoding (Saguaro)
2603.03251.notes: Outside 90-day window (March 2026). Inference framework, not a new draft model architecture.

2602.13836.title: SpecVocab: Speculative Decoding with a Speculative Vocabulary

2603.17942.title: ESP: Training-Free Multi-Token Prediction via Embedding-Space Probing

2603.12617.title: OnlineSpec: Speculative Decoding Meets Online Learning

2607.16673.title: SpecLA: Efficient Speculative Decoding for Linear-Attention Models
2607.16673.notes: Specifically for linear-attention models (GDN), not standard transformer LLMs. EAGLE-style drafter adapted for recurrent state management. Not applicable to speculators codebase.

2604.12989.title: DDTree: Accelerating Speculative Decoding with Block Diffusion Draft Trees
2604.12989.notes: Extends DFlash with tree-structured verification from diffusion drafter. Outside 90-day window (April 12, 2026). Diffusion-based.

2604.15672.title: SMC-SD: Faster LLM Inference via Sequential Monte Carlo Speculative Decoding
2604.15672.notes: Replaces token-level rejection with importance-weighted resampling. Verification algorithm change, not a new draft model architecture. Outside 90-day window (April 2026).

2601.11580.title: Speculative Decoding: Performance or Illusion?
2601.11580.notes: Benchmark/analysis paper studying SD variants on vLLM. No new method.

2506.03566.title: POSS: Position Specialist Generates Better Draft for Speculative Decoding
2506.03566.notes: Position-specialized draft layers (multiple specialists for different draft positions). Extends EAGLE-style approach. From June 2025, outside 90-day window.

2606.07710.title: WhiFlash: Accelerating Speculative Decoding with Token-Level Cross-Paradigm Routing
2606.07710.notes: Cross-paradigm routing framework between autoregressive (EAGLE-3) and diffusion (DFlash) drafters. Not a new draft model architecture — inference-time routing with cache management optimizations. Requires both drafter types simultaneously. More of a vLLM serving layer concern than a speculators model.

2606.27550.title: EntMTP: Accelerating LLM Inference with Entropy Guided Multi Token Prediction
2606.27550.notes: Training-free inference-time scheduler that toggles between tree-based attention topologies based on entropy. No new model architecture or training method. Modest speedups (1.15x over Hydra). Inference framework optimization only.

2605.02888.title: SpecKV: Adaptive Speculative Decoding with Compression-Aware Gamma Selection
2605.02888.notes: Adaptive gamma (speculation length) selection via small MLP. Inference-time optimization, not a new draft model architecture.

2605.30580.title: Speculative Decoding Across Languages
2605.30580.notes: Empirical comparison of multilingual finetuning strategies for existing draft models. No new architecture.

2603.23911.title: MTP-D: Self-Distillation for Multi-Token Prediction
2603.23911.notes: Self-distillation to boost MTP head acceptance rates. Training method improvement. Outside 90-day window (March 2026).

2411.05894.title: SSSD: Simply-Scalable Speculative Decoding
2411.05894.notes: Training-free n-gram matching method. Outside 90-day window (November 2024).

2510.22876.title: EQSPEC/EXSPEC: Batch Speculative Decoding Done Right
2510.22876.notes: Batch synchronization algorithms for serving. Outside 90-day window (October 2025).

2602.23881.title: LK Losses: Direct Acceptance Rate Optimization for Speculative Decoding
2602.23881.notes: Training loss function improvement for draft models. Outside 90-day window (February 2026).

2507.11851.title: Your LLM Knows the Future: Uncovering Its Multi-Token Prediction Potential
2507.11851.notes: Self-speculative approach using gated LoRA for multi-token prediction. Modifies base model directly. Outside 90-day window (July 2025).

2607.08690.title: A Practical Investigation of Training-free Relaxed Speculative Decoding
2607.08690.notes: Empirical survey/benchmarking of existing relaxed SD techniques. No new method or architecture.

2607.12696.title: EcoSpec: Cost-Aware Speculative Decoding for Mixture-of-Experts
2607.12696.notes: Draft-tree selection optimization for MoE models (expert activation cost). Serving-side optimization, not a new draft model architecture. Not implementable in speculators.

2605.30852.title: SPD: Speculative Pipeline Decoding
2605.30852.notes: Pipeline-parallel speculation using intermediate target model representations. Requires modifying target model inference pipeline. Doesn't fit speculators' separate-model paradigm.

2605.09329.title: Test-Time Speculation (TTS)
2605.09329.notes: Online distillation that adapts existing draft models at inference time. Training method improvement for existing speculators (DFlash, EAGLE-3). Not a new model architecture. Worth pursuing as a manual training enhancement.

yuyijiong/speculative_pipeline_decoding.notes: Pipeline decoding model, not a new draft architecture.

param108/iisc_llm_draft_model.notes: Generic draft model, no novel architecture.

payelb/rnn-speculative-decoding-classifi.notes: RNN-based classifier for spec dec, not a new draft method.

praful-goel/speculative_decoding_models.notes: Generic OpenWebText-trained draft models. No novel architecture.

RyeCatcher/speculative-decoding-cross-do.notes: Cross-domain analysis model, not a new draft method.

sgl-project/SpecForge.notes: Training tool for SGLang, not a new spec dec method.

Nanji-Huaji/DuoDecoding.notes: Cloud-edge-end distributed inference, not a new draft model.

ARahim3/mlx-dspark.notes: MLX port of DSpark for Apple Silicon. Not a new method.

Rmuk655/Distill-Spec-Research.notes: Research repo on draft-target alignment. Not a new method.

jireh-father/fastserve.notes: Auto-config tool for vLLM (quantization + spec dec). Not a new method.

Parusann/edgespark.notes: Quantized speculative decoding on consumer AMD GPU. Application of existing methods.

Komalpreet2809/Chimera.notes: General LLM inference engine built from scratch. Not a new spec dec method.

binhdnguyen/DeepSeek-V4-Flash-DSpark-2x-.notes: DSpark serving recipe for DGX Spark. Not a new method.

NVIDIA/Model-Optimizer.notes: NVIDIA optimization toolkit. Includes spec dec as one of many techniques.

hec-ovi/strix-vllm-laguna-s2.1.notes: vLLM serving setup for AMD Strix Halo with DFlash. Application of existing methods.

maleshep/hpc-llm-serving.notes: Slurm-based LLM serving with existing spec dec methods.
